title: rubus × imperfectus
intro: Rubus × imperfectus is a hybrid plant species within the Rubus genus, often referred to as a black raspberry or a purple raspberry. The plant exhibits medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of anthocyanins, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits associated with Rubus × imperfectus include reduced inflammation, improved cardiovascular health, and potential anti-cancer properties. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea, jam, or supplement, and its leaves and fruits can be used in herbal preparations for their medicinal and culinary value.
